title: verbascum fruticulosum
intro: Verbascum fruticulosum, also known as downy mullein, is a biennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its tall stature, fuzzy leaves, and showy yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum fruticulosum include soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The herbal preparations of downy mullein can be made into infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
